name: Conditional Required Field
description: Require a field when another field has a specific value. Most common validation pattern.

examples.name: Opportunity Close Date Required
examples.useCase: Require Close Date when Opportunity is marked as Closed Won
examples.errorMessage: Close Date is required when Stage is Closed Won. Please enter the date the deal closed.

examples.name: Case Closure Reason Required
examples.useCase: Require Closure Reason when Case is marked as Closed
examples.errorMessage: Closure Reason is required when Status is Closed.

examples.name: Quote Approval Number Required
examples.useCase: Require Approval Number when Quote status is Approved
examples.errorMessage: Approval Number is required when Quote status is Approved.

testCases.name: Should trigger validation (trigger condition met, required field blank)
testCases.errorMessage: Close Date is required when Stage is Closed Won.

testCases.name: Should pass validation (trigger condition met, required field populated)
Should pass validation (trigger condition not met, required field blank)
Should pass validation (trigger condition not met, required field populated)

variations.name: Multiple Trigger Values
variations.description: Require field when any of several values selected
variations.formula:
AND(
  OR(
    ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won"),
    ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost")
  ),
  ISNULL(CloseDate)
)

variations.name: Record Type Specific
variations.description: Require field only for specific record type

bestPractices: Use ISNULL() for date/number fields, ISBLANK() for text fields
For picklist fields, use ISPICKVAL() instead of = operator
Always provide clear, actionable error message
Test with all possible trigger values
Consider edge cases (record type changes, profile bypasses)
commonPitfalls: Using = operator instead of ISPICKVAL for picklists
Not testing when trigger condition is not met
Forgetting to test with null/blank values
Error message too generic (doesn't specify which field)

deploymentConsiderations.impactAnalysis: Test formula against existing records to identify violation rate
deploymentConsiderations.rolloutStrategy: If violation rate >1%, consider staged deployment with grace period
deploymentConsiderations.userCommunication: Send email to affected users with list of records needing attention

author: Salesforce Plugin Team
